====Pokémon====
This listing is of Hapu's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{MissingInfo|1|java|enva}}
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hapu
|pkmn=Golurk
|type1=Ground
|type2=Ghost
|img=Hapu Golurk.png
|epnum=SM104
|epname=That's Some Spicy Island Research!
|vajp=Keiichi Nakagawa
|vaen=H.D. Quinn
|desc={{p|Golurk}} is Hapu's first known Pokémon. It helps Hapu with her farming by picking Poni radishes out of the ground and helps its Trainer get around by flying around the island. When Hapu assumed {{Ash}} to be a radish thief, she used Golurk to battle [[Ash's Pikachu]] and won.

It reappeared in ''[[SM127|Chasing Memories, Creating Dreams!]]'', where it was shown battling and losing to [[Gladion's Lycanroc]] in a [[Island challenge|grand trial]] battle.

Golurk's known moves are {{m|Flash Cannon}} and {{m|High Horsepower}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hapu
|pkmn=Mudsdale
|main=yes
|type1=Ground
|img=Hapu Mudsdale.png
|epnum=SM104
|epname=That's Some Spicy Island Research!
|vajp1=N/A
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Mudsdale}} is Hapu's second known Pokémon. She uses it to transport Poni radishes by loading them on bags on its side. When confronting [[Team Skull]], she used Mudsdale to battle them and easily won. In ''[[SM109|A Grand Debut!]]'', Mudsdale was used in Hapu's [[Island challenge|grand trial]] against Ash. Despite its strength, Mudsdale was eventually defeated when {{AP|Pikachu}} splashed water on it, simulating the effects of {{m|Soak}}, allowing it to defeat it with {{m|Gigavolt Havoc}}.}}
